ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Memorie Imprese e Ritratti de’ Signori Accademici Gelati di Bologna
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Raccolte nel principato del signor Valerio Zani il Ritardato all’eminentissimo et reverendissimo signor cardinale Francesco Barberino decano del sacro collegio accademico e protettore
ItacWorkItem.Illustration: Engraved flyleaf | Academy emblem | Engraved plates | Portraits of academicians; their emblems; their coats of arms
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Here, titlepage and fly-leaf are reproduced.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Vidit Ioseph Cribellus ex Clericis Regularis Cong. S. Pauli Poenitent. In Metropolitana Bononien. Pro Eminentissimo ac reuerendis[simo] D. Hieronymo Boncompagno Archiep. Bonon. & Principe | Vidit pro Reverendis[simo] P. Inquisitore Bononiae D. Vitalis Terra Rubea a Parma Prior Cassinensis S.T.D. Publicus Lector & S. Officij Consultor | Imprimatur. Fr. Michael Pius Passus Inquisitor Generalis Bononiae
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
